Render it as stylized low-poly fantasy art with clean polygonal forms, crisp planar shading, faceted sapphire crystal, fluid magical shapes, and focused moonlit lighting. Compose for a circular crop: place the complete magical event at the exact center and contain every important shape within an imaginary central circle. Keep the corners and outer edges quiet. Do not draw a visible circle. Family-friendly, no photorealism, no text, no symbols, no logo, no border, no card frame, no UI.
